message:
fix(ssh): default ControlMaster off, add fallback retry, and fix alias-based path topology

Three interconnected improvements to SSH reliability and path handling:

SSH ControlMaster (ssh.rs):
  - Default control_master to false in SshOptions — stale control sockets
    were poisoning otherwise healthy connections on multi-agent workloads
  - Add automatic fallback: when ControlMaster connection fails, retry
    with a plain SSH session before propagating the error
  - Refactor connect() into connect_with_mode() and configure_builder()
    for cleaner separation of mux vs plain session setup
  - Move ControlPersist configuration into the control_master=true branch
    so it's only applied when mux reuse is explicitly opted in

Path topology (path_topology.rs):
  - Add try_resolve_alias_target() — when the canonical root doesn't
    exist but the alias root is a symlink, resolve the symlink target
    and use it as the canonical root. This fixes path normalization on
    machines where /dp/projects is a symlink to /Users/.../projects
  - Add test: normalize_direct_path_via_alias_target_when_canonical_root_missing

Hook improvements (hook.rs):
  - Add detect_worker_system_dependency_failure() handler to catch and
    report remote build-environment failures with structured error codes,
    remediation hints, and RCH error catalog integration
  - Fix build_dependency_preflight_report() to use entry.remote_root
    instead of entry.local_root for manifest path construction — the
    manifests are checked on the worker, not locally
  - Add effective_sync_topology_roots() to unify canonical/alias/resolved
    root enumeration for is_within_sync_topology checks
  - Add map_sync_root_to_remote_root() to correctly translate local paths
    to remote paths using the topology root hierarchy
  - Fix build_sync_closure_plan() to use map_sync_root_to_remote_root
  - Extract synced_remote_roots() helper for verify_remote_dependency_manifests

Transfer pipeline (transfer.rs):
  - Add control_master field to SshOptions initialization, keyed to
    whether ssh_control_persist_secs is configured
  - Gate control directory creation on control_master being enabled
  - Add tests: default plain SSH sessions and explicit ControlMaster opt-in

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
